testcase.name: Config-driven tests: iam › should render the correct site title and meta tags
Config-driven tests: iam › should inject requested assets from config
Config-driven tests: iam › should include runtime injection tags when configured
Config-driven tests: iam › should render navigation based on i18n keys
Config-driven tests: iam › should render home page content from template and i18n
Config-driven tests: iam › should render footer copyright from i18n
Config-driven tests: iam › should correctly transition through routes defined in config
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should initialize AppContext on application load
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should inject runtime bundle/styles/hydration tags
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support custom element definitions
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should handle state machine transitions
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support service calls
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support data binding
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support event handling
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support i18n integration
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should handle form submissions
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should maintain application state
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support error recovery
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support lazy loading
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should initialize with correct HTML structure
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support custom attributes
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should emit telemetry events
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should support shadow DOM components
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should handle viewport changes
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should handle concurrent operations
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should clean up resources
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should handle storage integration
UX3 Framework Core E2E Tests › should handle history API
IAM Application E2E Tests › should load IAM application
IAM Application E2E Tests › development logging should emit inspector message
IAM Application E2E Tests › should display login form initially
IAM Application E2E Tests › should validate form inputs
IAM Application E2E Tests › should handle user input
IAM Application E2E Tests › should handle form submission
IAM Application E2E Tests › should maintain state during navigation
IAM Application E2E Tests › should handle rapid interactions
IAM Application E2E Tests › should display UI components correctly
IAM Application E2E Tests › should not have console errors
IAM Application E2E Tests › should handle network errors gracefully
IAM Application E2E Tests › should respond to accessibility interactions
IAM Application E2E Tests › should display responsive layout
IAM Application E2E Tests › should handle modal/dialog if present
IAM Application E2E Tests › should maintain data consistency
IAM Application E2E Tests › should handle loading states
IAM Application E2E Tests › should display success/error messages
